completed_steps.summary: Loaded documentation-requirements.csv (12 project types) for fresh start.
No docs/index.md found; scan_level=exhaustive selected by user via AskUserQuestion.

Classified as monorepo with 3 documented parts (leash-core=backend, controlui-web=web, mac-leash=desktop) + 3 ancillary directories (npm-leash, build-scripts, e2e) folded into deployment/dev guides. Confirmed by user.
Inventoried 18 existing docs (root, docs/, docs/design/, docs/todo/, part READMEs, CI workflows). User specified 4 focus areas and excluded BMad scaffolding directories from analysis.

Tech stack captured: leash-core (Go 1.23+, github.com/cedar-policy/cedar-go, github.com/cilium/ebpf, gorilla/websocket, charmbracelet/bubbletea+lipgloss, OpenTelemetry SDK, pelletier/go-toml v2); controlui-web (Next.js 16, React 19, TS, Tailwind v4, shadcn/Radix, Monaco editor, xyflow/reactflow, TanStack Query, Vitest, pnpm); mac-leash (Swift + Xcode, EndpointSecurity + NetworkExtension frameworks, Sparkle updater). CLI orchestration via Makefile (precommit, lsm-generate, build-ui, docker-leash). Release via Goreleaser + Docker multi-arch + npm OIDC trusted publishing.

key_deps: github.com/gorilla/websocket v1.5.3 — WS hub for events/UI
github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea v0.25.0 + lipgloss v0.9.1 — terminal UI
go.opentelemetry.io/otel v1.38.0 + sdk + metric + trace + stdouttrace — telemetry
leash-core.build: CGO_ENABLED=1 for leashd (eBPF), CGO_ENABLED=0 for leash-entry; cmd/leash multiplexes runner | --daemon→leashd | --darwin→darwind

key_deps: shadcn/ui style components built on @radix-ui/* (avatar, dropdown-menu, label, navigation-menu, scroll-area, separator, slot, tabs, tooltip)
controlui-web.build: pnpm + next build; assets embedded into Go binary at internal/ui/dist

mac-leash.framework: AppKit/SwiftUI status-bar app + EndpointSecurity + NetworkExtension system extensions
mac-leash.shared: Swift sources in mac-leash/Shared/ (DaemonSync, NetworkRule, PolicyModels, LeashIdentifiers, LeashNotifications)

container_base_images: leash/runtime-base:latest (debian:bookworm + bash, busybox, libbpf1, iptables, tini, tcpdump)
build_release_summary.goreleaser: goos=[linux,darwin], goarch=[amd64,arm64], CGO_ENABLED=0 for leash binary
build_release_summary.ci_release_workflow: .github/workflows/release.yml (verify → release → stage-npm → publish-npm, OIDC to ECR + npm)

focus_areas: cross-reference existing design docs (link, don't duplicate)
deep map of internal/ packages and call graph
daemon-side HTTP/WS API surface from controlui-web perspective
macOS native architecture (XPC, ES, NE) + Go daemon sync surface

project_parts.notes: CLI binary that runs a daemon stack: HTTP/WS server, MCP observer, eBPF/LSM enforcement, Cedar policy engine, OpenTelemetry.
Next.js 16 + React 19 + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/Radix UI + Monaco + xyflow/reactflow + TanStack Query.
Xcode project: status-bar app, Endpoint Security extension, Network Filter extension, CLI helper, shared models.

ancillary_dirs.name: npm-leash
ancillary_dirs.summary: Thin npm wrapper that downloads prebuilt binaries (@strongdm/leash).

ancillary_dirs.name: build-scripts
ancillary_dirs.summary: Python/shell release scripts (Docker tagging, NPM publish, GHCR, goreleaser hooks).

ancillary_dirs.name: e2e
ancillary_dirs.summary: End-to-end Go tests (boot_test.go, complete_test.go, integration/, mcpserver/).

findings.project_classification: monorepo with 3 documented parts (backend Go core, Next.js web, Swift macOS native), 3 ancillary directories

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. Re-run /bmad-document-project to refresh; it will detect existing index.md and offer rescan/deep-dive.
